sourceMovie.title: Shotgun Wedding
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Shotgun Wedding works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Shotgun Wedding clicked for you, Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End (2007) is a strong next stop: both trade in action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Shotgun Wedding?
faq.answer: Try Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End, Armageddon, Creed III—each shares DNA with Shotgun Wedding while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Shotgun Wedding?
faq.answer: Shotgun Wedding (2022) is best described as Action, Comedy, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Shotgun Wedding worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
